title: Australian Cheese Fritters
description: A tangy and savory cheese fritters recipe inspired by Australian cuisine. Perfect as a snack or as a side dish for your next BBQ.
instructions: 1. Preheat oil in a deep frying pan over medium heat.
2. In a bowl, mix together cheese, stir (breadcrumbs), fry (oil), chewy (breadcrumbs), and tangy (onion).
3. Using a spoon, drop small balls of the mixture into the hot oil.
4. Fry the fritters until golden brown, about 3-4 minutes.
5. Remove the fritters from the oil with a slotted spoon and place them on a paper towel to drain excess oil.
